input: Following insider tips, reporters found GEO services online. Providers claim paying clients can rank high in AI models and make ads the 'standard answers'. Can GEO really make AI promote hidden ads or spread false information?

input: Content: Factories including Chengdu Mingyang Food have foul, dirty workshops but produce snow-white chicken feet by illegally using hydrogen peroxide for bleaching. Chinese regulations ban hydrogen peroxide in chicken foot processing. Long-term consumption causes oral mucosal damage, liver and kidney impairment, and can be life-threatening in severe cases.
output: 内容： 成都市明扬食品等企业的生产车间臭气弥漫、环境脏乱，但出产的鸡爪却色泽白净，原因在于违规使用了双氧水（过氧化氢）进行漂白。国家规定加工鸡爪严禁使用双氧水，长期食用经其浸泡的食品，会导致口腔黏膜损伤及肝肾功能损害，严重者危及生命。

input: The Codex App is smooth but closed-source; there’s no telling when new features will be added, so I had to give it up. In the AI era, open-source is better—you can add any features you want directly.
output: Codex App虽然体验流畅但不开源，想要的各种feature都不知道什么时候才能塞进去，还是只能忍痛放弃了。AI时代还是选择开源的更舒服一些，有什么想加的都能直接加。

input: Content: The 2025 e-bike standard limits speed to 25 km/h, but Hello Bike and others rent over-speed vehicles. Some reach 75–80 km/h. Streamers promote illegal speeds openly, ignoring standards and creating huge safety hazards.
output: 内容： 2025年《电动自行车安全技术规范》新国标规定时速不超25公里，但调查发现，哈啰租电动车等连锁品牌及地方门店，公开租赁违规超标车辆。实测显示，部分租赁车辆车速竟然高达75至80公里/小时。电商主播在直播间也公然宣传违规超标性能，完全无视国家标准，安全隐患极大。
